lint.notes: 2 complexity warnings (compareQuotes at 30, handleRequest at 29; max 20). These are pre-existing and non-blocking.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the three-way branching logic for gas-adjusted comparison (ETH/WETH output subtracts gas, non-ETH shows gas informationally, fallback when gas unavailable). Also documented Gas Used: N/A display when gas data is absent.
Documented the hardcoded Flashbots Protect RPC URL (https://rpc.flashbots.net) and its location in src/server.ts, used for MEV Protection swap flow on Ethereum mainnet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'All existing API endpoints must remain unchanged' boundary. Both .factory/library/architecture.md and the mission AGENTS.md state /compare is off-limits or unchanged, yet the orchestrator explicitly assigned gas-adjusted-comparison to modify /compare's recommendation_reason format and add gas_price_gwei to the response. The language should distinguish 'backward-compatible enhancements to response content' (allowed) from 'breaking changes to endpoint contract' (not allowed). Current wording causes unnecessary confusion for workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature gas-adjusted-comparison (commit 7816504) was orchestrator-assigned to modify /compare's comparison logic and response; .factory/library/architecture.md line 'All existing API endpoints must remain unchanged: /health, /chains, /compare, /quote, /metrics' and mission AGENTS.md Off-Limits section both list /compare as unchanged.

rejectedObservations.observation: mev-protection-toggle: The new URL param 'mevProtection' and other URL params (chainId, from, to, amount, slippageBps, sender) are not documented in AGENTS.md or the architecture library.
rejectedObservations.reason: Consistent with existing practice — no URL params are currently documented. Adding documentation for one param in isolation would be incomplete; this is a broader documentation initiative. Not a new gap introduced by this feature.
